query: ALTER TABLE ail_org_context ADD COLUMN vision_inputs_json TEXT COMMENT 'JSON: VisionModalInputs {ambitionStatement, aiRoleInHR, aiRoleInBusiness, timeHorizonMonths, geographicScope, constraints, successLooksLike, whatWontChange}' AFTER user_vision_input; ALTER TABLE ail_org_context ADD COLUMN vision_inputs_updated_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'When vision modal inputs were last saved' AFTER vision_inputs_json;
